header.exploreNetwork: Explore our network of certified professionals. Pick a slot, connect, and secure your session.
header.slide2Desc: Answer a few questions and let our smart matching find the right doctor for your symptoms and preferences.
header.slide3Desc: A soothing, anxiety-free booking experience with breathing guides and seamless payment.

footer.yourTrustedPlatform: Your trusted platform for booking appointments with healthcare professionals. Making quality healthcare accessible to everyone.

auth.signUpPrompt: Sign up to book your appointments
auth.signInPrompt: Sign in to continue to your appointments
auth.pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordMinChars: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.noOrg: No organization found. Please select or create one.

about.discoverStory: Discover the story behind Tabibi and our commitment to making high-quality medical care approachable, calming, and available to everyone, everywhere.
about.yourTrustedCompanion: your trusted companion in managing your healthcare journey conveniently and efficiently.
about.weUnderstand: We understand the challenges individuals experience when scheduling consultations, monitoring diagnostics, and tracking health records.
about.atTabibi: At Tabibi, we are committed to absolute excellence in healthcare technology. We continuously innovate, integrating the latest advancements to reduce patient anxiety, streamline workflows, and prioritize mental comfort alongside clinical efficiency.
about.ourGoal: Our goal at Tabibi is to build a seamless, completely friction-free healthcare portal for every user. We bridge the gap between patients and specialized caretakers, providing direct access to premium care when you need it most.
about.frictionFree: Friction-free, calming appointment slot booking integrated with patient scheduling timelines.
about.instantDirectory: Instant directory filters and dedicated specialist recommendations direct to your screen.
about.soothingVisual: Soothing visual flows, breathing guides, and real-time form checks designed to lower anxiety.

contact.haveQuestions: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help you every step of the way.
contact.learnMore: Learn more about our teams and job openings.

doctors.searchDirectory: Search our directory of certified health professionals and schedule seamlessly.
doctors.noDoctorsMatch: No doctors match the selected filters.

appointment.noConsultations: No consultations available for the selected date.
appointment.letsBreathe: Let's take a calming deep breath together while we connect you with
appointment.noAvailableSlots: No available slots for this day

myAppointments.viewAndManage: View and manage your upcoming schedule, process payments, and share doctor session feedback.
myAppointments.takeThisMoment: Take this moment to rest, take a deep breath, and enjoy the day. When you need us, your caretakers will be right here.
myAppointments.cancelConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to cancel this scheduled session? This action cannot be undone, and your slot will immediately be made available to other patients waiting for care.
myAppointments.paymentProofSubmitted: Payment proof submitted! Waiting for verification.

collaborations.discoverPartners: Discover Tabibi partner pharmacies and labs for a connected care journey.

specialistFinder.diagnosticMatching: Our diagnostic matching tool coordinates your specialty, schedule availability, and session fee preferences to align you with the right specialist.
specialistFinder.whatDepartment: What clinical department or specialty are you looking for?
specialistFinder.tellUsPreference: Tell us a bit about your preference for
specialistFinder.basedOnChoices: Based on your schedule and rating choices we found
specialistFinder.viewAllSpecialists: View all specialists in this department →
specialistFinder.noExactMatch: No exact match matches your criteria
specialistFinder.couldNotFind: We couldn't find specialists matching all your preferences in
specialistFinder.tryLoosening: Try loosening your budget or rating limits.

clinicalDescriptions.cardiology: Heart health, blood pressure, and cardiovascular wellness.
clinicalDescriptions.neurology: Brain, nervous system, chronic headaches, and spine care.
clinicalDescriptions.urology: Kidney, bladder, urinary tract, and male reproductive health.
clinicalDescriptions.orthopedics: Bones, joints, ligaments, sports injuries, and physical therapy.
clinicalDescriptions.dentistry: Oral hygiene, dental care, crowns, and smile enhancement.
clinicalDescriptions.ent: Sinus, hearing, swallowing, and upper respiratory tract.
clinicalDescriptions.dermatology: Skin conditions, acne, eczema, mole tracking, and cosmetic care.
clinicalDescriptions.ophthalmology: Eye health, vision checkups, and optical prescriptions.
clinicalDescriptions.gastroenterology: Digestive tract, stomach, liver, and abdominal health.

chatbot.sorryNoResponse: I'm sorry, I couldn't get a response.
chatbot.tryAssistant: Need help? Try Tabibi AI Assistant!

specialityMenu.notSureWhichDoctor: Not sure which doctor is right for you?
specialityMenu.useGuidedFinder: Use our guided multi-step finder to filter by specific symptoms, availability, rating, and fee preferences in under 30 seconds.
